name: secrets-defense
description: Blocks credential file reads and masks .env values, showing keys with partial value prefixes only.

rules.name: credentials_file_block
rules.message: Blocks reads of credential and key files (.pem, .key, id_rsa, credentials.json, .npmrc, .netrc, etc.)

rules.name: env_value_masking
rules.message: Masks values in .env files, preserving keys and showing only a 4-character prefix of each value.
